blended.narrative: Whitewater is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,749 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 8" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
